languages.text: When an enemy enters 4-cell radius around wearer, shoots a {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot{/g} at them. This effect is only active on other ceatures' turns.

traits.locale_text: When an enemy enters 4-cell radius around wearer, shoots a {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot{/g} at them. This effect is only active on other ceatures' turns.

traits.locale_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user fires a {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' turns.

When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' turns.

languages.text: Когда противник входит в радиус 4 клеток вокруг персонажа, персонаж использует против него {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Атаку из огнемета: распылитель{/g}. Этот эффект применяется только в {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} других существ.
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Когда противник входит в радиус 4 клеток вокруг персонажа, персонаж использует против него {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Атаку из огнемета: распылитель{/g}. Этот эффект применяется только в {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} других существ.

Когда противник входит в радиус 4 клеток вокруг персонажа, персонаж использует против него {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Атаку из огнемета: распылитель{/g}. Этот эффект применяется только в {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} других существ.

languages.text: Cuando un enemigo entra en un radio de 4 casillas en torno al usuario, el usuario usa {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Disparo de lanzallamas: rociada{/g} contra el objetivo. Este efecto solo está activo durante los {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g} de otras criaturas.
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cuando un enemigo entra en un radio de 4 casillas en torno al usuario, el usuario usa {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Disparo de lanzallamas: rociada{/g} contra el objetivo. Este efecto solo está activo durante los {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g} de otras criaturas.

languages.text: Betritt ein Gegner ein Feld in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Nutzer, setzt dieser {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flammenwerfer-Schuss: Sprühen{/g} gegen das Ziel ein. Dieser Effekt ist nur während der {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Züge{/g} der anderen Kreaturen aktiv.
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Betritt ein Gegner ein Feld in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Nutzer, setzt dieser {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flammenwerfer-Schuss: Sprühen{/g} gegen das Ziel ein. Dieser Effekt ist nur während der {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Züge{/g} der anderen Kreaturen aktiv.

languages.text: Quand un ennemi entre dans une zone d'un rayon de 4 cases autour de l'utilisateur, ce dernier utilise {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Tir de lance-flammes : Jet{/g} sur la cible. Cet effet s'active uniquement au cours des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g} d'autres créatures.
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Quand un ennemi entre dans une zone d'un rayon de 4 cases autour de l'utilisateur, ce dernier utilise {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Tir de lance-flammes : Jet{/g} sur la cible. Cet effet s'active uniquement au cours des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g} d'autres créatures.

languages.text: Bir düşman, kullanıcının etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içine girdiğinde kullanıcı, hedefe {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Alevsaçan Atışı: Püskürtme{/g} yapar. Bu etki, yalnızca diğer yaratıkların {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turları{/g} esnasında aktiftir.
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bir düşman, kullanıcının etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içine girdiğinde kullanıcı, hedefe {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Alevsaçan Atışı: Püskürtme{/g} yapar. Bu etki, yalnızca diğer yaratıkların {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turları{/g} esnasında aktiftir.

languages.text: 敌人进入使用者附近4格内时，使用者对目标施展{g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}火焰喷射器射击：喷火{/g}。此效果仅在其他生物的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内生效。
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 敌人进入使用者附近4格内时，使用者对目标施展{g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}火焰喷射器射击：喷火{/g}。此效果仅在其他生物的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内生效。

languages.text: 敵がプレイヤーの周囲4マス圏内に侵入すると、プレイヤーは{g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}炎撃:噴射{/g}で敵を攻撃する。この効果は他のクリーチャーの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中にのみ有効。
languages.original_text: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 敵がプレイヤーの周囲4マス圏内に侵入すると、プレイヤーは{g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}炎撃:噴射{/g}で敵を攻撃する。この効果は他のクリーチャーの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中にのみ有効。
